positioning.headline: Zero-to-One AI Program Builder: I architect programs for permanence

profile-hierarchy.primary: Profile 2: Zero-to-One Builder—Strongest evidence, clearest differentiation, manageable gaps
profile-hierarchy.supporting: Profile 1: AI Process Transformation—Process engineering + pattern recognition at scale
Profile 3: Applied AI Architecture—Design + lightweight implementation capability

differentiators.diff: Permanence architecture: 6 programs across 3 companies, all still running 3-7+ years after departure—Stratozone became Migration Center, Industry BA became accreditation standard
Builder-architect hybrid: Decision support tool used by VP-CIO, WaivePath 8-agent system, Food Network Windows 8 app (85% of code)
Zero-to-one builder: SME for Stratozone acquisition (now Migration Center), Value Engineering 10X growth, accreditation standards still in use
Rapid executive engagement: Tribune CEO access in weeks, AON competitive win vs Google, McDonald's CIO/VP adoption
Builder-not-operator: Creates things that become teams, then hires leaders—intentional pattern selecting OUT of management

target-titles.rationale: Signals 0-1 capability ("Innovation"), incorporates architecture ("Transformation"), appropriate for Google/Microsoft pedigree

metric.context: SME for Stratozone acquisition; product still in production
Google Cloud Value Engineering scaled from $150M baseline (10X), 9 months
Built decision support tool used by senior leadership for AI investment decisions
Synthesized 325 use cases into 22 patterns; 10 submitted for funding
Designed and led GCP Champs; 7X completion rate
Led Google Cloud Industry Business Architecture program
Converted Tribune relationship into Azure partnership
6 programs still running 3-7+ years post-departure across Google and McDonald's

position.title: Principal AI Architect (Generative AI)
position.highlights: Decision support tool for VP-CIO, 10-layer architecture endorsed by CIO, 22 patterns (10 funded), GCP Champs (154 participants, 100 certs)

position.title: Founder & Principal
position.highlights: Agentient: multi-agent platform in early beta; WaivePath: shipped 8-agent system, learned GTM lessons

position.title: Principal Program Manager
position.highlights: Led 88 contributors across 12 industries, 85% content production reduction.

position.title: Head of Value Engineering
position.highlights: SME for Stratozone acquisition (now Migration Center), scaled pipeline $150M→$1.5B (10X)

position.title: Principal Strategic Advisor
position.highlights: Enterprise security evangelist, first security specialist team

position.title: Principal Client Partner
position.highlights: $800M book of business, cloud services portfolio

position.title: Founder & Principal
position.highlights: WotCom app Top 10 in 4 countries, Top 200 in major markets

position.title: Senior Business Development Manager
position.highlights: $2.5M internal investment, Walmart partnership, Food Network launch app

position.title: Senior Platform Strategy Advisor
position.highlights: Won AON vs Google (first major BPOS customer), Tribune Azure partnership ($1.5M savings), CEO access in weeks

position.title: Architect Evangelist
position.highlights: Office 2007 launch showcase, Circle of Excellence 2008

position.title: Enterprise Architect
position.highlights: Six Sigma Black Belt, 20% policy cycle reduction, 14% acceptance improvement

position.title: Managing Consultant / Practice Lead
position.highlights: Led 10 consultants, $1M AVSC deal, 5X performance improvement

position.title: Managing Consultant
position.highlights: CRM development, identity management system, auth framework

position.title: Trainee / System Software Programmer
position.highlights: Driver development, COBOL certification, Computer Science diploma

education.degree: Bachelor of Commerce - General Management + IT (UNISA, 2000)

credentials.awards-summary: 2x Circle of Excellence (Microsoft), MGX Best in Class, 3x Top Contributor, 2x Exceeds Expectations (Google), DEA Special Agent Award, USSS Contribution Award

career-summary.keywords: Generative AI, LLM, AI platform, AI architecture, multi-agent systems, RAG, prompt engineering, Google Cloud Platform, GCP, Azure, cloud migration, enterprise architecture, target state architecture, value engineering, TCO analysis, pipeline generation, program management, cross-functional leadership, C-level engagement, business development, Six Sigma, process improvement, technology evangelism
